016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.conversion;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonGenerator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException;
020import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonSerializer;
021import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.SerializerProvider;
022import org.bitcoinj.core.Transaction;
023
024import java.io.IOException;
025
026/**
027 * Serialize a transaction as a hex-encoded binary string.
028 */
029public class TransactionHexSerializer extends JsonSerializer<Transaction> {
030    @Override
031    public void serialize(Transaction value, JsonGenerator gen, SerializerProvider serializers) throws IOException, JsonProcessingException {
032        gen.writeString(HexUtil.bytesToHexString(value.serialize()));
033    }
034
035}
